b3x_overdue.title: Complete Q1/Q2 CEO Checklist and Blueprint

strategic_direction.title: Review & Approve April Content Emails
strategic_direction.reasoning: April is quickly approaching. Approving the content emails will allow us to get them scheduled and sent out, ensuring consistent communication with GS Home Services' audience.

strategic_direction.title: Website Performance Audit and Optimization Proposal
strategic_direction.reasoning: GS Home Services does not currently utilize our website services. With a strong performance in paid ads, improving the website user experience could significantly increase lead conversion rates.  This also ties into the current campaign expansion and budget increase initiatives.

strategic_direction.title: Implement Dedicated Reporting Dashboard
strategic_direction.reasoning: GS Home Services does not currently utilize our reporting services. Given the successful sales period and the detailed ROI analysis already performed, a dedicated reporting dashboard would streamline data access and improve decision-making. This ties into the budget increase initiative.

suggested_agenda.topic: Quick Wins: Review In-Progress Items & Client Action Items (Content Email Approval)
suggested_agenda.notes: Address any questions regarding email content. Ensure they are on track for review.

suggested_agenda.topic: Strategic Proposal: Website Performance Audit and Optimization Proposal & Dedicated Reporting Dashboard
suggested_agenda.notes: Present the benefits of our website and reporting services, focusing on increased conversion rates and streamlined data access.
Assign owners and deadlines for all action items discussed during the meeting.
